generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the motor shaft for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the gearbox for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Position angle data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Position angle data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SimulatedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Simulated torque (τ) from Coulomb-Viscous friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:ProducedData [
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataInput [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity (ω) from friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for asset structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for asset structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Coulomb-Viscous friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Stribeck friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Dahl friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Implementation [
    base:desc "Simulink model for LuGre friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the asset"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for linking data sources"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLinkingService
]

instance MQTTStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840D : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot control"
    DTDFVocab:enables RobotControlService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for operator visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Structural modeling of the asset using SysML"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelingInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight, AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction
]

instance DataLinkingService : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Data source linking via Asset Administration Shell"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLinkingInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance RobotControlService : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Control of robot axis via position/speed/acceleration inputs"
    DTDFVocab:provides RobotControlAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization in dashboard for operator insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance MonitoringAndRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring and model refinement during operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight, ModelRefinementAction
]

instance TwinningProcessService : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven methodology with steps: problem identification, asset analysis, model creation, data identification based on reference model [15]"
    DTDFVocab:provides TwinningProcessInsight
]

]

    base:desc "Dashboard provides visualization for operator insights"
]

]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction : DTDFVocab:LifeCycleStage [
    base:desc "Adjustment of robot control algorithms based on friction model insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RobotControlAction : DTDFVocab:LifeCycleStage [
    base:desc "Control of motor via position/speed/acceleration inputs from CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StructuralModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:TechDetails [
    base:desc "Structural model insights for asset representation"
]

instance DataLinkingInsight : DTDFVocab:TechDetails [
    base:desc "Data sources linked via Asset Administration Shell"
]

    base:desc "Sensor data streamed via MQTT"
]

instance TwinningProcessInsight : DTDFVocab:TechDetails [
    base:desc "Insight into digital twin development process steps"
]

    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with current input for driving the robot axis"
]

    base:desc "Gearwheel component for rotational energy transmission"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox for rotational energy transformation"
]

instance DigitalShadowInstance : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Single digital shadow instance for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    base:contains MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SysMLBDD, SysMLIBD, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel, MeasuredCurrentData, MotorEncoderPositionData, SecondaryEncoderPositionData, SimulatedTorqueData, SimulatedAngularVelocityData, FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService, MonitoringAndRefinementService, SiemensSINUMERIK840D, SimulinkSimulationTool, DashboardVisualizationTool, MQTTStreaming, AssetAdministrationShell, SysMLModelingTool, StructuralModelingService, RobotControlService, DataLinkingService, DataStreamingService, FrictionModelInsight, DashboardVisualizationInsight, MonitoringInsight, ModelRefinementAction, AdjustControlAlgorithmsAction, RobotControlAction, StructuralModelingInsight, DataLinkingInsight, DataStreamingInsight, TwinningProcessInsight, TwinningProcessService
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with live measurements during robot operation; no specific time intervals specified beyond real-time synchronization"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "One-way data flow digital shadow integrating physical robot axis, sensors, SysML and Simulink models, processing components for simulation, and dashboard visualization; focused on friction modeling for motion control"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; continuous monitoring and model refinement during robot operation; not focused on design or manufacturing phases"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via comparison of simulated data versus measured reference data; deviation analysis for friction model accuracy; no explicit uncertainty quantification details"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) implementation as per Industrie 4.0 standards; SysML modeling; reference to MBSE methodologies (RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, SMArDT)"
]
